title: Agents frequently die in low health states
insight: The majority, 91%, of deaths occurred when the agent's health was below 30 HP.

title: Agents often die in short episodes
insight: Episodes frequently end with death rather than success, as evidenced by the mean episode length just before death being significantly shorter than those that succeed.
evidence: Mean episode length — deaths 98 vs successes 0 steps

title: Agents are often near empty ammo when dying
insight: The agent frequently dies with very low ammo, which may indicate a critical failure mode related to weapon management.
